ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION 220, DEFENDANT E.I. DUPONT DE NEMOURS AND CO.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. ARGUED AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION IS DENIED. DUPONT FAILED TO PROVIDE EVIDENCE OF PLAINTIFF'S FACTUALLY-DEVOID RESPONSES TO CONTENTION INTERROGATORIES IN ITS SEPARATE STATEMENT. WHILE DUPONT PROVIDED THIS EVIDENCE IN ITS REPLY, THE COURT DOES NOT CONSIDER ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE FILED FOR THE FIRST TIME WITH THE MOVING PARTY'S REPLY PAPERS. (SAN DIEGO WATERCRAFTS, INC. V. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. (2002) 102 CAL.APP.4TH 308, 315-316.) DUPONT THEREFORE FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN ON THE ISSUE OF EXPOSURE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: JAMES J. ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2018 Off Calendar

Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendants Foley-Pmi, Inc., And The Lunkenheimer Company
Off Calendar Mar-16-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Dustin Seesemann, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, CHARLES TOBEY.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendants FOLEY-PMI, INC., and THE LUNKENHEIMER COMPANY.
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:
IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED that the plaintiffs shall recover damages from defendants FOLEY-PMI, INC., and THE LUNKENHEIMER COMPANY in the amount of:

$101,927.92 in Economic Damages,
$300,000.00 in Non-Economic Damages,
Total Judgment of $407,927.92.

The Clerk is ordered to enter the judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance and tentative ruling adopted: DEFENDANT FLUOR CORPORATION's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS OFF CALENDAR PER REQUEST OF MOVING PARTY. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:

Oren P. Noah, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party CHARLES TOBEY
No other appearances.


RULING:
Defendant E.I. DuPont de Nemours and Co.'s motion for summary judgment. Argued and tentative ruling adopted. Defendant's motion is denied. DuPont failed to provide evidence of plaintiff's factually-devoid responses to contention interrogatories in its separate statement. While DuPont provided this evidence in its reply, the court does not consider additional evidence filed for the first time with the moving party's reply papers. (San Diego Watercrafts, Inc. v. Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. (2002) 102 Cal.App.4th 308, 315-316.) DuPont therefore failed to shift the burden on the issue of exposure. Order signed in open court. Judge: James J. McBride, Reporter: Diana Padilla CSR # 9975 =(220/JJM)
